meaning: n.<主美>奥运会选手adj.奥林山神的,庄严的
examples: Getting his book into print has been an Olympian task in itself.
The importance of being an Olympian will vary from athlete to athlete.
But I just kept thinking, wow, greatest Olympian of all time.
Minister for Sport Shona Robison said Sir Chris had confirmed his status at Scotland's greatest-ever Olympian.
He's also likely to take home a bigger prize: becoming history's most decorated Olympian.
